svg.title: Docker CI/CD workflow diagram
svg.desc: Full workflow from developer writing JavaScript code, committing to Git, through Jenkins CI building a Docker image, pushing to a private registry, then pulling and deploying both the JS app and MongoDB to a dev server.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a developer do in this Docker workflow?')
sendPrompt('What role does Git play in CI/CD?')
sendPrompt('What does Jenkins do in the CI/CD pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What happens during checkout in CI?')
sendPrompt('What tests run in a JS CI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does Jenkins build a Docker image?')
sendPrompt('Where does the MongoDB Docker image come from?')
sendPrompt('What is the MongoDB Docker image?')
sendPrompt('What is a private Docker registry and why use one?')
sendPrompt('How does the JS app container run on the dev server?')
sendPrompt('How does the MongoDB container connect to the JS app?')
sendPrompt('What is Docker Compose and how does it help here?')

svg.text: Click any box to learn more
